# R Complete Auto Care
> Crown Point Indiana's diagnostic-first auto repair shop. Specializing in complex diagnostics, extended warranty repairs, and fixing issues other shops misdiagnose.

## Business Information
- Name: R Complete Auto Care
- Address: 1305 E Summit St, Crown Point, IN 46307
- Phone: (219) 262-2711
- Email: Owner@rcompleteautocare.com
- Website: https://www.rcompleteautocare.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00am-6:00pm, Saturday 8:00am-2:00pm, Sunday Closed

## Services
- Check Engine Light Diagnostics: We trace fault codes to root cause — not just clear them
- Engine Repair: Diagnostic-first approach, head gaskets, timing, overheating, oil leaks
- Transmission Repair: Automatic, manual, and CVT — diagnose before recommending rebuild
- Brake Repair: Thorough inspections with measurements, pads, rotors, calipers, ABS
- Electrical Diagnostics: Parasitic draw, no-start, wiring faults, sensor failures, modules
- Suspension & Steering: Struts, shocks, ball joints, tie rods, alignments
- No-Start Diagnostics: Systematic diagnosis — battery, starter, fuel, spark, compression
- Extended Warranty Repair: CarShield, Endurance, CARS Protection, AmTrust, most providers
- AC & Heating Repair: Leak detection, recharge, compressor, heater core, blend doors
- Oil Change & Maintenance: Conventional and synthetic with multi-point inspection

## Service Area
Crown Point IN, St. John IN, Schererville IN, Merrillville IN, Cedar Lake IN, Lake County IN, Northwest Indiana

## What Makes Us Different
- Diagnostic-first: We find the exact root cause before recommending any repair
- Extended warranty specialists: We handle the entire claims process — customers just pay their deductible
- We fix what other shops misdiagnose — complex drivability, electrical, and intermittent problems
- 25+ years of family experience in auto repair
- Same-day diagnostics available
- Honest answers, no pressure — we tell you what's urgent and what can wait

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Do you accept extended warranties?
A: Yes. We work with most major extended warranty providers including CarShield, Endurance, CARS Protection, AmTrust, and others. We verify coverage, handle the pre-authorization call, and submit all documentation. Customers pay their deductible only.

Q: Do I need to go to a dealership for extended warranty repairs?
A: No. Most extended warranty policies allow any licensed repair facility. R Complete Auto Care is a licensed shop and works directly with warranty providers.

Q: What is your diagnostic process?
A: Every vehicle gets a full diagnostic scan of all modules before we recommend any repair. We find the root cause — not just the symptom — and give you a clear estimate before touching a tool.

Q: Do you work on foreign and domestic vehicles?
A: Yes. All makes and models including Honda, Toyota, BMW, Mercedes, Subaru, Ford, Chevrolet, Dodge, GMC, Jeep and more.

Q: Do you offer same-day service?
A: Yes. Most diagnostic appointments are completed same day with a call before any work begins.

Q: What areas do you serve?
A: Crown Point, St. John, Schererville, Merrillville, Cedar Lake, and all of Lake County Indiana.

## Trust Signals
- 4.8 stars on Google
- Extended warranty accepted from all major providers
- 25+ years family experience
- Diagnostic-first approach — no guessing, no unnecessary repairs
- Located at 1305 E Summit St, Crown Point IN 46307
